_note: Status 'mapped' means the component has been mapped to this criterion internally. It does not mean the criterion has been verified by a formal audit. Run audit-rules.json checks and update validation_status before changing overall_status.

criteria.title: Info and Relationships
criteria.evidence: Semantic <label> element with for attribute creates a programmatic relationship with its <input>. Required state uses aria-required='true' on the input. Error state uses aria-invalid='true' + aria-describedby.

criteria.title: Identify Input Purpose
criteria.evidence: Contract specifies appropriate type and autocomplete attribute guidance. Consumers are responsible for setting autocomplete per field purpose.

criteria.title: Contrast (Minimum)
criteria.evidence: Label text (#161616 on white) ~19:1 — passes AA/AAA. Placeholder (#6C737F on white) ~4.8:1 — passes AA. Disabled text (#9DA4AE on white) ~2.5:1 — exempt per WCAG 1.4.3 inactive component exception. Focus underline (#0D121C on white) ~21:1 — passes. Formal audit required against actual page backgrounds.

criteria.title: Non-text Contrast
criteria.evidence: Default border (#9DA4AE on white) ~2.9:1 — passes AA (3:1 minimum for UI components). Error border (#B42318 on white) ~5.9:1. Focused underline (#0D121C on white) ~21:1. Formal audit required.

criteria.title: Keyboard
criteria.evidence: Native <input> element is keyboard focusable by default. No custom keyboard handling added. Tab navigation managed by browser.

criteria.title: Focus Visible
criteria.evidence: .text-input__field::after provides a 2px bottom underline on :focus-within. Browser default outline is reset on .text-input__input. The custom indicator must be verified as sufficient per WCAG 2.4.7.

criteria.title: Focus Appearance (AAA)
criteria.evidence: Focus underline: 2px height, full width, #0D121C color on white = ~21:1 contrast. Meets AAA level non-text contrast for focus indicators.

criteria.title: Error Identification
criteria.evidence: .text-input--error provides visual error indication. aria-invalid='true' on input signals error to AT. Error message text (aria-describedby) is consumer responsibility at form-field assembly layer.

criteria.title: Labels or Instructions
criteria.evidence: .text-input__label is a semantic <label> associated to the input. Placeholder text supplements but does not replace the label.

standards.name: Platform Code Internal Design System Standards

criteria.title: Semantic label association
criteria.evidence: template.html uses <label class='text-input__label' for='...'> with matching id on <input>. Audit rule enforces this.

criteria.title: Required state communication
criteria.evidence: Contract specifies required + aria-required='true' on input. Asterisk is aria-hidden='true'.

criteria.title: Focus indicator visible
criteria.evidence: .text-input__field::after shows 2px underline on :focus-within. outline: none on native input is acceptable because custom indicator is provided.

criteria.title: Error state accessible
criteria.evidence: Component provides .text-input--error class. Consumer must add aria-invalid and aria-describedby. Contract documents this requirement.

criteria.title: Component CSS uses component-level semantic tokens only
criteria.evidence: text-input.css uses --text-input-* tokens throughout. All tokens have inline fallbacks. Token definitions are missing from token.css — documented in analysis.md.

criteria.title: All states visually distinct
criteria.evidence: Six states mapped: default, hover, focus, pressed, disabled, read-only. Each has distinct border color or indicator. Verified against manifest tokens.

criteria.title: RTL support via dir attribute
criteria.evidence: CSS uses padding-inline-start/end logical properties throughout. No hardcoded padding-left/right. RTL triggered by dir='rtl' on ancestor.

variant_compliance_notes.note: Disabled text (#9DA4AE on white, ~2.5:1) is exempt from WCAG 1.4.3 contrast requirements per inactive component exception.
Placeholder contrast on --text-input-bg-darker (#F3F4F6): #6C737F on #F3F4F6 ~4.2:1 — passes AA. Verify after token.css integration.
Placeholder contrast on --text-input-bg-lighter (#FCFCFD): #6C737F on #FCFCFD ~4.8:1 — passes AA. Verify after token.css integration.
Error border (#B42318 on white) = ~5.9:1. Passes WCAG 1.4.11 non-text contrast (3:1 minimum).
